curation.synopsis: Deep within the great realm of Ultramar, the war world Kronus burns. Torquill Eliphas of the Word Bearers — captain of the Ark of Testimony Chapter, fighting through the Shadow Crusade beside the berserker warbands of the World Eaters — has spent months laying the foundations for something far older than this war. As Lorgar's invasion grinds across Ultramar, Eliphas means to plant on Kronus a Templum Daemonarchia, a structure intended to bind the warp into the stone of a captured planet. A short, lava-lit portrait of an ambitious Word Bearer captain at the moment his name is about to outlive the campaign, and of the dark thing being seeded into the soil of a world ten millennia before its next great war begins.
